publishedAbstract: - CSI provisioner pods are often restarted. Example of affected cluster: ~~~ csi-cephfsplugin-provisioner-8995b9bfd-dlth8 6/6 Running 0 24d csi-cephfsplugin-provisioner-8995b9bfd-g2jx8 6/6 Running 54 25d csi-rbdplugin-provisioner-5784795949-6mdnk 6/6 Running 84 38d csi-rbdplugin-provisioner-5784795949-zvvmt 6/6 Running 0 34d ~~~- The logs of the affected pods show the following error messages: ~~~ I0613 19:07:07.406975 1 csi-provisioner.go:121] Version: v2.0.4-0-g0b9348770 I0613 19:07:07.407098 1 csi-provisioner.go:135] Building kube configs for running in cluster...
